name: Gold Tone Heart Lariat Necklace and Bracelet Set
description: Add a romantic touch to your jewelry collection with this matching gold-tone set. Featuring a delicate multi-heart lariat Y-necklace and a coordinating heart charm bracelet, both pieces are crafted with an anti-tarnish finish for enduring elegance.

media.alt_text: Gold tone jewelry set featuring a multi-heart lariat necklace and matching heart charm bracelet

faqs.question: Does this set include both the necklace and bracelet?
faqs.answer: Yes, this jewelry set includes both the heart lariat Y-necklace and the matching heart charm bracelet.

faqs.question: Are these pieces resistant to tarnishing?
faqs.answer: Yes, both the necklace and bracelet feature a durable anti-tarnish finish to keep them looking pristine with regular wear.

meta_title: Gold Tone Heart Necklace & Bracelet Set | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop our Gold Tone Heart Lariat Necklace and Bracelet Set. This beautiful matching jewelry set features delicate heart charms and a lasting anti-tarnish finish.
